steps.title: Identify the similarity to emphasize
steps.content: The question asks to emphasize a similarity between the two films. Both The Three Passions and Désirée share one key characteristic: they both feature Merle Oberon.

steps.title: Find which choice highlights the shared characteristic
steps.content: Choice A uses the word both and states that both films include Merle Oberon, directly emphasizing their shared feature. The other three fail to emphasize similarity: B and C use contrast language (whereas, however) that highlights differences, and D mentions only one film. That matches choice A — A is correct.
